title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Senior Software Engineer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
